title: Section 5
content: Pending the constitution of the Central Board under section 8 of the principal Act as amended by this Act, the Governor of the Bank, or in his absence a Deputy Governor of the Bank duly nominated by him in this behalf, may, subject to such restrictions and conditions as may from time to time be imposed by the Central Government, exercise all powers, and do all acts and things which may be exercised or done by the Bank.
